name: Chicken and Noodle Soup with Vegetables
recipeIngredient: 1 Onion, halved and with 2 cloves inserted
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the whole chicken or the chicken pieces in a heavy 6-quart kettle with the water, onion halved with cloves inserted, leek, carrot, salt, and peppercorns. Bring to a boil and skim off any scum that forms on top.
2. Reduce heat and simmer for 2 hours. Correct seasoning as needed.
3. If using chicken parts, cook until tender (45 minutes to 1 hour). Remove the chicken, excess fat from broth, and vegetables.
4. Pour broth into a container, clean kettle, and return broth to it. Add cut vegetables, diced meat from legs/thighs, and sliced gizzards. Bring to boil again and cook until vegetables are tender but still firm.
5. Add noodles (increase for thicker soup) and peas; boil 5-9 minutes or until cooked through.
6. Serve hot in bowls, garnished with parsley. Ideal with buttered toast, hot rolls, salad, cheese, and red wine.
Note: Additional veggies like spinach, cabbage, zucchini, mushrooms can be added at the end.
